channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: API latency: Cloudflare Workers vs Fastly Compute@Edge
item.description: Cut API latency under 10 ms globally with Cloudflare Workers vs Fastly Compute@Edge — real benchmarks, code samples, and the mistakes that cost us 12 % of state during cache evictions.

item.title: How Google’s SRE culture cut downtime by 90% — here’s the code
item.description: Cut downtime by 91% with Google’s SRE culture — error budgets, progressive rollouts, and GitOps code you can run today. Includes real benchmarks, 2 code examples, and failure modes nobody mentions.

item.title: How RAG cut our hallucination rate from 18% to 2%
item.description: Cut hallucination rate from 18% to 2% with Retrieval-Augmented Generation — versioned pipelines, open-source models, and the exact stack that worked in production.

item.title: The 11 best multi-modal AI models in 2024
item.description: Cut end-to-end latency from 47 seconds to 1.8 seconds with multi-modal AI models — compare 11 options for text, image, and audio processing, with real benchmarks and costs for 2024.

item.title: Why Your 2026 Smart Home Keeps Guessing Wrong (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut smart home AI failure rates by 75% with sensor drift fixes — occupancy prediction accuracy, persistent buffers, and federated learning under 10ms response time for users in Lagos, Nairobi, and Accra.

item.title: AI finally explained: use it to learn anything faster
item.description: Cut skill-learning time by 30–50% using AI as a personalized tutor — worked examples, 3 concrete benchmarks, and the prompts that actually work, not the ones that waste time.

item.title: Junior dev jobs are dead — here's the receipts
item.description: Junior dev jobs dead: hat’s a 0.057% acceptance rate. Even if ever. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Write blog posts 80% faster with AI that still sound human
item.description: Cut draft time by 80% and edit time by 77% with AI that still sounds human — comparison table, code samples, and a free CLI tool included. AI voice cloning for content creation without robotic tone.

item.title: Why Your FP Code Fails with Impure Functions (and how to fix it)
item.description: Reduce functional programming errors by 80% with async purity rules — avoid 12ms latency spikes and 15 errors/month. functional programming concepts in practical code with promise handling and array methods

item.title: What Silicon Valley Engineers Really Think About Big Tech
item.description: Cut incident-related outages by 70% with this 200-line tracker used by ex-Big Tech engineers — SQLite, FastAPI, Prometheus metrics, and the discipline rules they don’t teach you

item.title: GitHub Copilot vs Cursor: Which AI Pair-Programmer Wins in 2025?
item.description: Cursor cuts debugging time by 30% and cloud costs by KES 200K/month — local embeddings, offline resilience, and fewer rejected lines compared to GitHub Copilot’s cloud model.

item.title: What VCs Actually Look For When They Invest In Your Tech Startup
item.description: Learn exactly what 3 VCs look for in startup unit economics with a real dashboard that reduced AWS costs from $12 to $0.02 per user and raised $26M in Series A. Includes code, benchmarks, and investor-tested scripts.

item.title: AI Side Hustles: Selling Prompts vs Fine-Tuning Models
item.description: Sell prompts for $9 and earn $45/hr in 7 days or fine-tune a model for $25k/month if you already have a paying customer — real numbers from Kenya, Rwanda, and Nigeria side hustles.

item.title: Remote tech jobs in 2026 are a scam unless you know this
item.description: Find 3 high-paying remote tech jobs in 2026 without job boards or recruiters — using niche portfolios, async-first companies, and value networks. Includes 1 benchmark, 3 salary figures, and a step-by-step next action.

item.title: Automated 50 daily tasks with Python in 3 weeks — here’s what broke
item.description: Cut weekly manual work from 11.5 hours to 2.3 hours with Python automation on a $12 VM — idempotency keys, Redis Streams, and the mistakes that almost broke it.

item.title: We scaled a URL shortener to 2 billion daily hits — here’s the blueprint
item.description: scaled URL shortener billion: onds, and 8% of connections timed out befo. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Technical Writing finally explained
item.description: Cut onboarding time by 50% with executable technical writing — README-first, ADRs that live in the repo, and the 15-minute audit that fixes the most broken step first.

item.title: Why Kotlin UI fails with 'Unresolved reference' errors
item.description: Fix 'Unresolved reference' errors in Kotlin Android projects. Enable View Binding, clear build cache, and avoid XML typos to ensure smooth development.

item.title: Ship a 300ms PWA that beats native in stores
item.description: Load a 320kbps PWA in under 300ms on repeat visits with offline playback — Progressive Web App beats native on speed, cost, and reach for content apps

item.title: Why GitHub Copilot writes code with 30% more bugs than a junior in 2024
item.description: Cut production bugs by 30% by fixing Copilot’s loose types and token limits — exact prompts, version pinning, and CI gates that stop AI regressions before deployment.
